name: Helmeted Hornbill
conservationEfforts: CITES Appendix I listing since 1975. Helmeted Hornbill Working Group coordinates range-state conservation. Anti-poaching patrols in key habitats. Demand reduction campaigns in consumer countries.
description: The only hornbill with a solid casque (hornlike structure on the bill), making it a target for illegal trade as a substitute for ivory. Males engage in dramatic aerial casque-butting contests.
